title: brickellia microphylla
intro: Brickellia microphylla, also known as Mexican brickellia or false willow, is a shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Brickellia microphylla have been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
